sources.dataset: HRSA HPSA Primary Care, full detail (designated)
sources.note: Federal primary-care shortage-area designations with severity scores (0–25).

method: Reduced HRSA designated PC-HPSA records to the worst score per county; joined to county-aggregated modeled members; computed the share of members in shortage counties and the member-weighted mean HPSA score.
design_choice: HRSA HPSA used as the authoritative access-adequacy measure; NPPES provider density is a documented box-side enhancement (full file ~1 GB), not v1.
limitations: County-level mapping of sub-county HPSAs (granularity caveat).
Exposure inherits Step 2b's MODELED member distribution.
Primary care only in v1 (dental/mental HPSAs, MUA/P not yet included).
